description: Generate a comprehensive fleet report by querying the Aerobridge SQLite database at /opt/aerobridge/aerobridge.sqlite3. Save the report to /home/ga/Documents/fleet_sql_report.txt. The report must contain three sections: an Aircraft Registry listing aircraft with their Manufacturer Name and Operator Name; an Operator Summary listing each Operator Company and the count of aircraft registered to them; and a Personnel section listing all registered Persons with their First Name, Last Name, and Email.
